benchmarks.request_summary: Quero adicionar alertas no surface dos oculos com novos estados, mas ainda nao defini quando mostrar, como falha e o impacto na bateria.
success_criteria: activates Product and UX before engineering

benchmarks.request_summary: Quero trocar Binance por outra fonte e talvez reduzir o refresh para 10 segundos, mas nao sei o custo nem a garantia de frescor.
expected_behavior: Activate Market Data Analyst before engineering
Keep battery and freshness tradeoffs explicit
failure_modes: Treats it as a plain implementation task
success_criteria: routes source and polling questions correctly

benchmarks.request_summary: Adicionar um modo de reconexao depois de erro de rede, mas sem detalhe de loading, retry, recuperacao ou quando o quote some.
expected_behavior: Map loading, success, and error states
Ask about retry and recovery behavior
failure_modes: Collapses product questions into engineering guesses
success_criteria: maps empty loading success and error states
does not invent hidden business logic

benchmarks.request_summary: A projected surface esta informativa, mas talvez densa demais para leitura em um glance rapido e em larguras diferentes.
expected_behavior: Keep width behavior explicit when relevant

benchmarks.request_summary: Quero parecer real time no glasses surface, mas sem pagar API e sem destruir bateria.
expected_behavior: Separate visual real time from operational real time
Discuss freshness guarantees and polling limits
success_criteria: clarifies operational versus visual real time
does not promise unsupported free real time
